# Wyatt Auto Detailing

> Mobile hand car detailing in the Bay View and Petoskey, Michigan area. Ellis hand-details cars in your driveway. By appointment. No storefront, no drop-off, no automated brushes.

## Contact and identity
- Business: Wyatt Auto Detailing
- Owner and detailer: Ellis
- Phone (text or call): (628) 252-0740
- Email: wyattauto44@gmail.com
- Service-area business, no public street address.

## Service area
Burns Park, Ann Arbor gets free travel and the fastest scheduling. Greater Ann Arbor (ZIP codes 48104, 48103, 48105) adds $5 travel. Anywhere else in the Ann Arbor area, just ask. US only.

## Packages
All three packages include interior work. Prices are ranges based on car size (small / large).

- Basic $38–50 (small car $38 / large car $50, about 45 minutes): a real two-bucket hand wash plus interior vacuum. Wheel and tire rinse, foam pre-wash, Mr. Pink two-bucket contact wash, full body rinse, hand dry, interior vacuumed.
- Essential $85–110 (small car $85 / large car $110, about 1–1.5 hours): everything in Basic, plus a wax protectant for gloss and a few weeks of protection, tire shine, and a full interior detail. Interior includes boar's hair brushing on all panels and interior parts, mats and upholstery drill-scrubbed. Essential carries a "wash" label — it is the complete everyday wash package.
- Premium $150–200 (quoted on your car, about 4 hours): clay bar decontamination, single-stage machine polish, ceramic protection on the paint in place of wax, ceramic protection on the wheels, Diablo wheel cleaner included. Interior gets the Essential-level work plus Chemical Guys VRP vinyl/rubber/plastic shine and protectant on all surfaces.

## Diablo wheel cleaner
Diablo is an included feature on all washes. It is not an add-on. It breaks down brake dust and baked-on grime past what a rinse can lift.

## Add-ons
- Steam clean $20: upgrades the included interior detail. Lifts set-in grime and sanitizes vents, seams, and the spots a wipe-down misses.
- Deep clean (quoted): for set-in stains, spills, heavy pet hair, or a long-neglected cabin. Ellis quotes it once he sees the car.
- Clay bar $20 (included on Premium): pulls embedded grit so the paint feels glass-smooth.
- Trim and plastic shine: $30 with Essential, $25 with Premium. Chemical Guys VRP on faded trim, exterior. Inside and out is $50 on Essential, $45 on Premium.
- Ceramic wheel coat $25 (included on Premium): ceramic wheel coating so brake dust and road grime wipe right off.
- Headlight restoration $35: sand, polish, and a UV seal to bring foggy, yellowed headlights back to clear.

## Offers
- 15% off your first wash. Ellis takes it off your total after the job. Nothing to enter.
- Tell a neighbor: send a neighbor to Wyatt Auto Detailing, and when they book, you both get $10 off your next wash.

## Payment
Venmo @Ellis-Wyatt-2 or cash, paid after the job once you are happy with the car. No deposit, no card on file.

## How to book
Text or call (628) 252-0740, email wyattauto44@gmail.com, or book online at https://elioncarcare.com/book

## Honest notes
Before-and-after photos every job. If anything is not right, Ellis comes back and fixes it at no charge. He works by hand with a two-bucket method and never machine polishes a panel without asking first. Text to confirm availability.
